testcase.name: test_seeded_allsale_credentials_login[admin@allsale.events-admin123-admin]

failure.message:
AssertionError: User 'admin@allsale.events' name still says AURA: 'AURA Admin' assert 'AURA' not in 'AURA Admin'
'AURA' is contained here: AURA Admin ? ++++

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_rebrand_regression.py:37: in test_seeded_allsale_credentials_login assert "AURA" not in (body.get("name") or ""), f"User '{email}' name still says AURA: {body.get('name')!r}" E AssertionError: User 'admin@allsale.events' name still says AURA: 'AURA Admin' E assert 'AURA' not in 'AURA Admin' E E 'AURA' is contained here: E AURA Admin E ? ++++
